title: AmoreAutoWireContract
description: Output contract for `amore-mcp --register-claude-code --self-contained`. Emitted to stdout as a single JSON object. Exit 0 iff errors == []. Schema version: 1.

detected.description: IDE/editor installations found on the host (by binary path, config dir, or registry key).

wired.description: Targets successfully updated with the amore MCP entry.

skipped.description: Targets detected but intentionally not modified (already configured, or user opt-out scope).

errors.description: Targets where modification was attempted but failed. Non-empty array = exit 1.

id.description: Stable identifier for the IDE/editor bridge.

config_path.description: Absolute path to the per-user config file that was located (e.g. ~/.claude.json).

version.description: Version string of the detected installation, if readable.

backup_path.description: Absolute path of the backup created before modification, if any.

error.description: Error message (stdout+stderr captured from the failed write attempt).
